seoTitle: Add a Calendar Booking Widget to a GoHighLevel Funnel
metaDescription: Learn how to add a calendar booking widget to a funnel page in GoHighLevel so clients can schedule appointments directly.
intro: Letting clients book appointments directly from your funnel page removes a lot of friction from the sales process. This tutorial shows how to add a calendar booking widget to a GoHighLevel funnel page and configure it for a smooth booking experience.

steps.heading: Open your funnel page editor
steps.body: Go into the funnel page where you want to add the booking widget within GoHighLevel.

steps.heading: Add the calendar booking widget
steps.body: Insert the widget element onto your funnel page in the location where you want visitors to schedule.

steps.heading: Configure the widget settings
steps.body: Connect the widget to the correct calendar and adjust availability settings so bookings sync properly.

steps.heading: Review the benefits for your business
steps.body: Use the widget to reduce manual scheduling and double bookings for services like consultations or coaching sessions.

faq.question: Can I connect the booking widget to multiple calendars?
faq.answer: Yes, you can typically choose which specific calendar the widget pulls availability from, and set up different widgets for different calendars.

faq.question: Will the widget send automatic reminders to clients?
faq.answer: Yes, once integrated, GoHighLevel can send automated confirmations and reminders tied to the booking.

faq.question: Do I need a paid GoHighLevel plan to use the booking widget?
faq.answer: Calendar booking features are part of GoHighLevel's core functionality, though availability can depend on your specific subscription tier.

faq.question: Can I customize the look of the booking widget to match my funnel?
faq.answer: Yes, you can typically adjust styling elements so the widget fits the overall design of your funnel page.
